title: Plugin Manager: Loading and Registering Plugins
interaction_flow: loadRepository → PackageSorter: sortPackages(packages, weights) → sortedPackages[] (composer/installers gets weight -10000)
loadRepository → RepositoryUtils: filterRequiredPackages(packages, rootPackage, true) → requiredPackages[]
loadRepository [loop each sortedPackage of type composer-plugin or composer-installer]:
loadRepository → PluginManager: isPluginAllowed(package.name, false, true, false) [if not in requiredPackages]
PluginManager → PluginManager: arePluginsDisabled('global') → false (if globalComposer != null)
registerPackage → PluginManager: arePluginsDisabled('local'|'global') [guard, return if true]
registerPackage [if composer-plugin]: validates composer-plugin-api constraint via VersionParser + Constraint
registerPackage → PluginManager: isPluginAllowed(package.name, isGlobalPlugin, optional) [may prompt IOInterface]
registerPackage [guard]: checks registeredPlugins[package.name] already set → return if duplicate
registerPackage → PackageInterface: getExtra() → extra['class'] (string or array of class names)
registerPackage → Composer: getPackage() → rootPackage (clone, files autoload cleared)
registerPackage → PluginManager: collectDependencies(installedRepo, autoloadPackages, package) → full dep map
registerPackage → PluginManager: shouldAutoloadPackage(pkg, path) [dedup via autoloadedPackages cache]
registerPackage [loop files in map['files']]: composerRequire(fileIdentifier, file) [skip laminas bridge hack]
[if class already loaded]: eval patched class code with renamed class (_composer_tmpN suffix)
[if composer-installer type]: new $class(io, composer) → InstallationManager: addInstaller(installer)
[if composer-plugin type]: new $class() → PluginManager: addPlugin(plugin, isGlobalPlugin, package)
key_relationships: PluginManager depends_on Composer (holds reference, calls getRepositoryManager, getPackage, getAutoloadGenerator, getInstallationManager, getEventDispatcher, getConfig)
PluginManager depends_on InstalledRepository (builds per-plugin for dependency collection)
PluginManager depends_on EventDispatcher (addSubscriber for EventSubscriberInterface plugins)
PluginManager depends_on InstallationManager (addInstaller for legacy composer-installer type)
conditions_and_guards: isPluginAllowed: checks allowPluginRules/allowGlobalPluginRules patterns; prompts user if interactive and no rule found; throws PluginBlockedException if blocked
Package type filter: only 'composer-plugin' or 'composer-installer' packages are processed
API version check: requiresComposer constraint must match current PLUGIN_API_VERSION
Duplicate guard: registeredPlugins[package.name] already set → skip
Class collision handling: if class already loaded, eval with renamed _composer_tmpN class
loadRepository local: checks requiredPackages (RepositoryUtils.filterRequiredPackages) before isPluginAllowed for non-global repos
composer/installers gets weight -10000 → sorted first (loaded before other plugins)
important_notes: Constructor calls parseAllowedPlugins reading config 'allow-plugins' and Locker. loadInstalledPlugins() is the main entry point. Global plugins loaded after local. Plugin class file-autoload 'files' rules from root package are cleared before building autoload map to avoid missing-dep issues at boot time. Legacy composer-installer type uses InstallerInterface, not PluginInterface.
